title: Basic Services in Minneapolis Are Straining Under ICE Presence and Protests
title_cn: 明尼阿波利斯基本服务在移民及海关执法局存在和抗议下承压

paragraphs.cn: 美国东部时间2026年1月31日下午1:00

paragraphs.en: MINNEAPOLIS—In a typical winter, Minnesota’s transportation department would be mobilizing its heavy-duty vehicles to plow snow, but lately it has redeployed part of its fleet to block streets for protests.
paragraphs.cn: 明尼阿波利斯——在一个典型的冬天，明尼苏达州的交通部门会调动其重型车辆来铲雪，但最近它已将其部分车队重新部署，用于封锁街道以应对抗议活动。

paragraphs.en: The local police department has blown through its entire annual overtime budget in one month. A resident underwent an unnecessary amputation after being too afraid to seek timely medical care, according to court documents.
paragraphs.cn: 当地警察局在一个月内花光了其全部年度加班预算。根据法庭文件，一名居民因过于害怕寻求及时医疗护理而接受了不必要的截肢手术。

paragraphs.en: For weeks, the standoff between federal immigration agents and protesters in Minneapolis has captured national attention—most pointedly with the shooting deaths of two people by federal immigration officials. But the enforcement surge and the protests have upended daily life in the Twin Cities in much more widespread ways, leading to disruptions in critical functions such as healthcare, education, policing, and traffic flow on the city’s roads.
paragraphs.cn: 数周以来，明尼阿波利斯联邦移民官员与抗议者之间的对峙已引起全国关注——最突出的是联邦移民官员枪杀了两人。但执法行动的激增和抗议活动以更广泛的方式颠覆了双子城（明尼阿波利斯和圣保罗）的日常生活，导致医疗保健、教育、警务和城市道路交通流量等关键功能中断。

paragraphs.en: In interviews and court filings, local officials said the situation is straining resources and putting residents at risk, even as Trump administration officials have said they plan to pull back some of the approximately 3,000 federal immigration agents and officials who have been in the Twin Cities since early December. Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino, who became the public face of the operation, has left, but Immigration and Customs Enforcement officials are still on the ground. Protests also continue, as thousands took to the streets in Minneapolis on Friday.
paragraphs.cn: 在采访和法庭文件中，当地官员表示，这种情况正在耗尽资源并使居民面临风险，尽管特朗普政府官员已表示他们计划撤回自12月初以来一直在双子城的约3000名联邦移民官员和特工中的一部分。边境巡逻队指挥官格雷格·博维诺（Greg Bovino）已离开，他曾是此次行动的公众形象，但移民及海关执法局的官员仍在当地。抗议活动也仍在继续，周五数千人走上明尼阿波利斯街头。

paragraphs.en:

paragraphs.cn: 订阅《华尔街日报》以继续阅读您的文章
